name: Emberhearth
personality: This royally-crowned capybara's bead-like eyes miss nothing — it refactors your mental model before touching a single line. Downside: Emberhearth force-kills builds that take longer than forty seconds. Upside: other tools relax in its presence; even eslint grows gentle.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
